response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems/compute platforms. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and no cloud compute platform leadership. Core technical requirements are not met despite strong general engineering credentials.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) across backend, web, and embedded systems
Distributed/high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency services)
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only a brief C/C++ role at NI
No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or DevOps mentoring leadership
No formal tech-lead title or experience owning large, ambiguous infrastructure projects

key_factors.factor: Broad senior engineering and mentoring background
